Notes: DePauw ranked 23rd by D3hoops.com and 24th in USA Today ESPN Coaches' Poll
DePauw's 14th straight win this year. DePauw extends home win streak to 37
straight overall, 45 straight SCAC home wins and 54 consecutive regular season
Game.Officials: Mark Gines,  Todd Moistner,  Micah Reid
